subject: Re: How are you?
body:
havebella talk to me

--- Manuela Stotter <mstotter@assouline.com> wrote:

> Hi Jeffrey,
> 
> Where are you?....I saw sarah a couple of times in
> the Gym and she looks
> amazing as usual.
> 
> I'm currently working at assouline and everything is
> fine....I'm happy.
> 
> I need to ask you something.
> 
> Remember when last january I had the visit at the
> Dentist Magnani?
> It was the 5th and the 6th of january.
> 
> Since the invoice was very high: $435.00 and I just
> started working, at that
> time I asked you if you could help me paying.
> 
> I remember you said it was ok.
> I already decided to change dentist since he is to
> expensive for me.....
> 
> Bella, just called me for this payment and I wonder
> if you still want to do
> it.
> 
> Please let me know....it will really help me.
> 
> manu
> -- 
> Manuela Stötter  
> Assouline, Inc.
> 601 West 26th Street, 18th Floor
> New York, NY 10001
> Tel. 212 989 6769
> Fax. 212 989 6853
> 
> 
>

body_html:
havebella talk to me

--- Manuela Stotter mstotter@assouline.com wrote:

Hi Jeffrey,

Where are you?....I saw sarah a couple of times in
the Gym and she looks
amazing as usual.

I'm currently working at assouline and everything is
fine....I'm happy.

I need to ask you something.

Remember when last january I had the visit at the
Dentist Magnani?
It was the 5th and the 6th of january.

Since the invoice was very high: $435.00 and I just
started working, at that
time I asked you if you could help me paying.

I remember you said it was ok.
I already decided to change dentist since he is to
expensive for me.....

Bella, just called me for this payment and I wonder
if you still want to do
it.

Please let me know....it will really help me.

manu

Manuela Stötter
Assouline, Inc.
601 West 26th Street, 18th Floor
New York, NY 10001
Tel. 212 989 6769
Fax. 212 989 6853
